summary: VideoAI Studio v4 with Magic Hour API integration testing completed. Backend: 25/25 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements, navigation, and features working correctly (100%). CRITICAL ISSUE: Magic Hour API integration is broken - API requires direct URLs or special file_path from upload API, but current implementation passes local file paths (/app/backend/uploads/...), causing 422 errors. All other v4 features (multi-character lip sync, sound effects, video trimming, WebView player) working as expected.

critical.issue: Magic Hour API rejects local file paths. Error: 'Invalid asset path /app/backend/uploads/file.png. Input a direct URL to the image file, or the file_path field from the response of the upload urls API'. Current implementation at server.py line 269-279 passes local file paths directly to MagicHourClient.v1.face_swap.create(). Magic Hour requires either: 1) Direct URLs to hosted files, OR 2) Special file_path from their upload API (https://docs.magichour.ai/api-reference/files/generate-asset-upload-urls)

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - React Native warning, not breaking functionality

Reference: https://docs.magichour.ai/api-reference/files/generate-asset-upload-urls
Update /api/upload-face-image to upload to Magic Hour and return their file_path
Update /api/upload-video to upload to Magic Hour and return their file_path
Update process_faceswap_background to use Magic Hour file_path values instead of local paths

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Existing projects from previous testing iterations present in database (23 projects total, including failed face swap projects due to Magic Hour API issue).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Magic Hour API integration is broken. The API requires direct URLs or special file_path from their upload API, but current implementation passes local file paths. Backend logs show: 'Invalid asset path /app/backend/uploads/file.png. Input a direct URL to the image file, or the file_path field from the response of the upload urls API'. Fix requires: 1) Implement Magic Hour file upload API to get file_path values, 2) Update upload-face-image and upload-video endpoints to upload to Magic Hour, 3) Update process_faceswap_background to use Magic Hour file_path instead of local paths. All other features (multi-character lip sync, sound effects, video trimming, WebView player, navigation) working correctly. Backend tests: 25/25 passed. Frontend tests: 100% passed.
rca_of_issue: Root Cause: Magic Hour API integration incomplete. The face swap feature was migrated from Replicate to Magic Hour, but the file handling was not updated. Replicate likely accepted local file paths or had different upload mechanism. Magic Hour API requires files to be uploaded to their service first using their upload API (https://docs.magichour.ai/api-reference/files/generate-asset-upload-urls) which returns a special file_path value. This file_path must then be used in face_swap.create(). Current code at server.py line 269-279 passes local file system paths directly to Magic Hour API, which rejects them with 422 error. Reproduction: 1) Upload face image via /api/upload-face-image (saves locally), 2) Upload video via /api/upload-video (saves locally), 3) Call /api/create-faceswap with local paths, 4) Background task calls MagicHourClient.v1.face_swap.create() with local paths, 5) Magic Hour API returns 422 error. Mitigation: Implement Magic Hour upload flow in upload endpoints and use returned file_path values in face swap creation.
